creator: marcel@scc.nl
text:
When using snmpwalk, the agent (snmpd) enters a endless loop.
The loop consists of a repeated failing action; writing to the
logfile in each iteration and thus filling the filesystem in
minutes.
Cause: Returncodes are not checked and acted upon.
("never fail" assumed?)

Fix: Apply the following patch:
How-To-Repeat: 
Run snmpwalk after restarting the agent.
